data.description:
Expose a verification steps field (ordered list of strings) on knots-backed beats across three surfaces, and update the scope-refinement prompt to include acceptance criteria.

**Create beat lightbox**
- Display verification steps as an editable list of strings.
- Support keyboard-only navigation: add a new item (Enter at end of list), move between items (Up/Down arrows), and delete the focused item (Backspace on empty item or dedicated key binding).
- Mouse interaction (click to focus an item, click to delete) also supported.

**Beat detail panel**
- Same editable list with identical keyboard-navigation and add/remove behavior as the lightbox.

**Queues screen and Active screen (active-row overview)**
- Add a verification steps column (or badge/count) to the existing row-overview component so the presence and count of steps is visible at a glance without opening the detail view.

**Scope refinement prompt**
- Update the prompt template used during scope refinement to include an acceptance criteria section, mirroring what this work item demonstrates.
